name: Church- Window Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt chocolate chips and butter over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Add colored marshmallows and 1/4 cup of the chopped nuts.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly combined.
5. Divide the mixture into two equal portions.
6. Roll each portion into 6-inch long logs and roll in the remaining chopped nuts.
7. Wrap each log tightly in waxed paper.
8. Chill thoroughly for 2-3 hours before slicing and serving.
